name: Bubble and Squeak 2
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat butter in a large skillet and fry onion over low heat for 5 minutes or until softened.
2. Add the cabbage (previously boiled) and stir over low heat for 2 minutes.
3. Mix in the mashed potatoes until well combined.
4. Press the mixture lightly with the back of a spoon to form a large pancake.
5. Cook on one side for 5 minutes until lightly browned.
6. Turn the pancake and cook the other side for an additional 5 minutes.
